rules.applies_to: balcony attached to a Backyard Suite
rules.condition: project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane

citation.quote: A balcony attached to a Backyard Suite may project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane to a minimum setback of 0.6 metres from the property line.
minimum building setback from a rear property line is: (a) 1.5 metres for any portion of the building used as a Backyard Suite
the maximum building height for a Backyard Suite is 7.5 metres

rules.condition: between the closest façade of the main residential building to the closest façade of a Backyard Suite. 10P2019

citation.quote: (3) Unless otherwise referenced in subsections (3.1) and (3.2), a minimum separation of 5.0 metres is required between the closest façade of the main residential building to the closest façade of a Backyard Suite. 10P2019

rules.condition: measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district

citation.quote: (4.1) The maximum building height for a Backyard Suite is: 5.0 metres measured from grade at a side property line shared with a parcel designated with a low density residential district

rules.condition: (a) in the R-C1L, R-C1Ls, R-C1, R-C1s, R-C1N, R-1, R-1s and 24P2018 R-1N Districts; or (b) when located on a parcel with a parcel width less than 13.0 metres
rules.exception: excluding any area covered by stairways and landings

citation.quote: (2) Except as otherwise stated in subsections (2.1) and (3), the maximum 23P2016 floor area of a Secondary Suite, excluding any area covered by stairways and landings, is 100.0 square metres: (a) in the R-C1L, R-C1Ls, R-C1, R-C1s, R-C1N, R-1, R-1s and 24P2018 R-1N Districts; or (b) when located on a parcel with a parcel width less than 13.0 metres

rules.exception: excluding any area covered by stairways and internal landings not exceeding 2.5 square metres

citation.quote: (5) The maximum floor area of a Backyard Suite, excluding any area covered by stairways and internal landings not exceeding 2.5 square metres, is 75.0 square metres

rules.applies_to: Duplex Dwelling, Semi-detached Dwelling or Single Detached Dwelling
rules.condition: Developed Area and R-C1L or R-C1Ls districts

citation.quote: The building setback from the front property line for a Duplex Dwelling, Semi-detached Dwelling or Single Detached Dwelling in the Developed Area is deemed to conform with the requirements of this Bylaw if the building setback from the front property line is a minimum of 6.0 metres for the R-C1L or R-C1Ls districts

rules.condition: project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane

citation.quote: A balcony attached to a Backyard Suite may project into a required 10P2019 setback area from a property line shared with a street or a lane to a minimum setback of 0.6 metres from the property line.
minimum building setback from a rear property line is: (a) 1.5 metres for any portion of the building used as a Backyard Suite
